pr.title: Record: 11L + Tight SWA + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + TTT (val_bpb: 1.1231)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs Tight SWA, shared value embeddings, partial RoPE, and LN scaling with post-quantization Test-Time Training on the validation shard.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs Test-Time Training fine-tuning on the validation shard for 25 epochs to recover quantization loss.
techniques: Tight SWA averaging of recent low-scale checkpoints
Shared 128-d value embeddings plus partial RoPE & LN scaling in upper layers
Quantized model adapted via 25-epoch Test-Time Training on validation data
